title: Custodian Error Register
hypothesis: Custodian Error Register tests whether archive loss can be felt through irreversible filing decisions instead of decorative particles.
dataModel: seeded error cards with variable witness stamps and reversible custody warnings; mutation:route-rewrite
recordCountStrategy: seeded variable 11-25 records with no constant-size record array
interactionModel: pointer-scrub cards to expose stamps; click locks an error and updates the register summary; mutation mode route-rewrite
stateModel: localStorage stores recovered, locked, and misfiled record ids for this draft id
visualLanguage: stacked forms, monochrome stamps, small redaction tears
expectedStructuralChange: Interaction must change at least one record position, class, label, count, and persisted state.
